violations.text: The door handle located on the 2-door reach in was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
The door handle located on the 2 door reach in was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of inside the 2 door reach in, and the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The hand sink in the kitchen was observed leaking. Establishment must fix leak. Per PIC, a service call has already been made. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The floor in the walk-in freezer area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 Door fridge in the back room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The grout for the tile floor is in poor condition through out the establishment. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment has stated they are getting a full remodel. Establishment is to provide estimated date of remodel to DOH. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The floor in the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean under all shelving and equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The employee on door to the outside, located in the dinning area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
Gaskets located on the three low boy refrigerators were observed not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
